babyDevelopment: Technically, you're not pregnant yet. This is the week of your period. Your body is shedding the old uterine lining while estrogen and progesterone stimulate your ovaries to start developing another egg for ovulation.
bodyChanges: Menstruation is occurring. You may experience cramps, bloating, and fatigue. Your hormones are resetting to prepare for a successful ovulation and potential implantation in about 14 days.
tips: Start taking 400mcg of Folic Acid daily
Switch from ibuprofen to acetaminophen if trying to conceive

travelAdvisory.note: Travel is perfectly safe as fertilization hasn't occurred yet.

warningSignsToWatch: Soaking more than one pad per hour
milestoneDescription: Your body is clearing the way for a brand new journey.
